description: Configure a NextGen Connect channel named 'CSV_Appt_Ingest' in the 'nextgen-connect' Docker container to ingest batch CSV files of patient appointments and transform them into HL7 v2.5.1 ADT^A04 messages. The channel must process CSV files from '/tmp/csv_input' (ignoring headers) with the columns MRN, FirstName, LastName, DOB, Sex, VisitDate, and ClinicCode. Map these fields to HL7 segments as follows: MRN to PID-3.1, LastName to PID-5.1, FirstName to PID-5.2, DOB (YYYY-MM-DD) to PID-7 (YYYYMMDD), Sex to PID-8, VisitDate (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) to PV1-44 (YYYYMMDDHHMM), and ClinicCode to PV1-3.1. Set MSH-9 to 'ADT^A04^ADT_A01'. Export the individual HL7 messages to '/tmp/hl7_output' inside the container using the filename format '${message.messageId}.hl7'. Trigger the channel by moving the host file '/home/ga/appointments.csv' into the container's input directory.
